main.description: Every adapter whose invocation-protocol kind matches (`subprocess`, `http`, `wasm`).

output.description: Paged<EnvelopedEntry<R>> — identical shape to the REST endpoint for this query.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by a prior page of results.

limit.description: Maximum number of entries to return in one page.

description: XRPC facade for the `adapters_by_invocation_protocol` catalog query. Mirrors the REST endpoint at `/v1/adapters/by-invocation-protocol`; both paths invoke the same handler.
